title: Very close verilogs do not SAT solve equivalent

features.name: unary XNOR reduction operator with bitwise complement
features.description: Code should include the ~^ (XNOR) unary reduction operator applied to a multi-bit vector, where parentheses grouping differs between two equivalent expressions

features.name: explicit parentheses grouping with XOR reduction
features.description: Code should include an explicit parentheses grouping around the ^ reduction operator before applying bitwise NOT, demonstrating the semantic equivalence issue with ~^ form
